name: BSI Model Validation - Name, Price & Image (Data Driven)

steps.name: Wait for selector getByRole('textbox', { name: /zip code/i })
Click getByRole('link', { name: 'Build & Price', exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('heading', { name: 'Build and Search Inventory' })
Scroll into view locator('#bsi-vehicle-cards .bsi-model-card-container').filter({ hasText: 'PALISADE Hybrid' }).first()

Scroll into view locator('#bsi-vehicle-cards .bsi-model-card-container').filter({ hasText: 'IONIQ 5 N' }).first()
